scripts.build: cd client && npm install && npm run build && mkdir -p ../server/public && cp -r dist/* ../server/public/ && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.postinstall: cd client && npm install && npm run build && mkdir -p ../server/public && cp -r dist/* ../server/public/ && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd server && npx nodemon index.js" "cd client && npm run dev"
